name: Hrimnir the Divine Follower
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>久</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>徒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フリムニル
name_jp_tl: Hrimnir the Divine Follower of Eternity
desc: You can Tribute 3 Fairy monsters from your hand and/or field; Set 1 Continuous Spell from your Deck, but send it to the GY during your opponent's End Phase. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Hrimnir the Divine Follower" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 3 Fairy monsters from your hand and/or field; Set 1 Continuous Spell from your Deck, but send it to the GY during your opponent's End Phase. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Hrimnir the Divine Follower" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute 3 Fairy monsters from your hand and/or field; Set 1 Continuous Spell from your Deck, but send it to the GY during your opponent's End Phase. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Hrimnir the Divine Follower" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
